name: opencae
description: OpenCAE local CAD/CAE simulation MVP scaffold.

scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm build:cloudflare && pnpm containers:build && pnpm containers:push && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --containers-rollout=immediate
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dry-run: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:containers: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm build:cloudflare && pnpm containers:build && pnpm containers:push && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --containers-rollout=immediate
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:containers:dry-run: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.reset:local: pnpm --filter @opencae/db reset && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
